omnibar_menuTitle.title: Search
omnibar_menuTitle.description: Title of the omnibar widget in the customizer panel.

omnibar_aiChatFormPlaceholder.title: Ask privately
omnibar_aiChatFormPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the AI chat input field.

omnibar_aiChatFormSubmitButtonLabel.title: Send
omnibar_aiChatFormSubmitButtonLabel.description: Accesible label for the AI chat submit button.

omnibar_logoAlt.title: DuckDuckGo
omnibar_logoAlt.description: Alt text for the DuckDuckGo logo.

omnibar_tabSwitcherLabel.title: Search & Duck.ai tab switcher
omnibar_tabSwitcherLabel.description: Accessible label for the tab switcher between search and AI modes.

omnibar_aiTabLabel.title: Duck.ai
omnibar_aiTabLabel.description: Label for the AI chat tab.

omnibar_searchFormPlaceholder.title: Search privately
omnibar_searchFormPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the search input field.

omnibar_searchFormCloseButtonLabel.title: Close
omnibar_searchFormCloseButtonLabel.description: Accessible label for the close button in the search form.

omnibar_toggleDuckAi.title: Duck.ai
omnibar_toggleDuckAi.description: Label for the button to toggle the Duck.ai chat interface.

omnibar_searchDuckDuckGoSuffix.title: Search DuckDuckGo
omnibar_searchDuckDuckGoSuffix.description: Text placed after suggestions that will search DuckDuckGo.

omnibar_duckDuckGoSuffix.title: DuckDuckGo
omnibar_duckDuckGoSuffix.description: Text placed after suggestions that will open a DuckDuckGo page.

omnibar_visitSuffix.title: Visit {url}
omnibar_visitSuffix.description: Text placed after suggestions that will open a webpage.

omnibar_askDuckAiSuffix.title: Ask Duck.ai
omnibar_askDuckAiSuffix.description: Text placed after aiChat suggestions that will submit a chat query.

omnibar_switchToTab.title: Switch to Tab
omnibar_switchToTab.description: Badge text shown next to open tab suggestions.

omnibar_customizePopoverTitle.title: Toggle between search and AI chat
omnibar_customizePopoverTitle.description: Title for the popover that introduces the search/AI toggle feature.

omnibar_customizePopoverDescription.title:
Either way, your info stays private.
Don't want this?
omnibar_customizePopoverDescription.description: Description message in the popover including privacy statement and customize option.

omnibar_attachImageLabel.title: Attach image
omnibar_attachImageLabel.description: Accessible label for the attach image button in the AI chat toolbar.

omnibar_removeImageLabel.title: Remove image
omnibar_removeImageLabel.description: Accessible label for the button to remove an attached image thumbnail.

omnibar_modelSelectorLabel.title: Select model
omnibar_modelSelectorLabel.description: Accessible label for the AI model selector dropdown.

omnibar_imageAttachmentLimitWarning.title: You can only attach {limit} images at a time.
omnibar_imageAttachmentLimitWarning.description: Warning shown when user attaches more images than the allowed maximum.

omnibar_imageTooLargeError.title: Image is too large. Please use an image smaller than 10000×10000 pixels.
omnibar_imageTooLargeError.description: Error shown when a user tries to attach an image that exceeds the maximum pixel dimensions.

omnibar_imageProcessingError.title: Failed to process image. Please try a different file.
omnibar_imageProcessingError.description: Error shown when an attached image cannot be processed.

omnibar_advancedModelsSectionHeader.title: Advanced Models - DuckDuckGo subscription
omnibar_advancedModelsSectionHeader.description: Section header in the model picker for premium models that require a subscription.
